eu_gap_verdict.prosafco_be: carries Honeywell PPE but not 1012541/1015021 — wrong domain for Leightning series
eu_gap_verdict.uvex_safety_com: wrong domain entirely — uvex-brand products, not Howard Leight/Honeywell PPE
eu_gap_verdict.gap_status: EU gap NOT closed by originally proposed domains. Real EU coverage found at safety5000.com (UK/EU) and laropadetrabajo.com (ES) — both inaccessible via script.
eu_gap_verdict.finding: EU-variant PPE coverage exists but on smaller/regional distributors with bot-protection. The gap is access-pattern gap, not source-nonexistence gap.

fx_notes: No new FX edge cases. USD→RUB normalized cleanly (rub_price=2987.6 for $33.95). EUR price for 1015021 (€29.15) not processed through script — would be EUR→RUB path, no fx_gap expected.
updated_rule_implication: ENRICHMENT-EU-VARIANT-SYSTEMATIC-SOURCE-GAP-001 should be updated: EU distributors DO exist (safety5000.com, laropadetrabajo.com) but are blocked by bot-protection at script level. Gap = access-pattern gap, not source-nonexistence gap. Proposed EU candidates (prosafco.be, uvex-safety.com) are wrong domain for Howard Leight product family.
